title: Smoky Jamaican Flatbread Tacos
description: A twist on traditional tacos, using flatbread as the shell and filled with intensely smoky Jamaican jerk chicken.
instructions: 1. Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
2. In a small bowl, mix together jerk seasoning and lime juice.
3. Add the chicken to the bowl and toss to coat.
4. Grill the chicken for 5-7 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
5. Meanwhile, toast the flatbreads by grilling or baking for 2-3 minutes.
6. Slice the red onion and cilantro.
7. Warm the flatbreads by wrapping them in foil and heating them in the oven for 2-3 minutes.
8. Assemble the tacos by placing a piece of chicken on each flatbread.
9. Top with red onion, cilantro, and a squeeze of lime juice.
10. Serve with Jamaican hot sauce on the side, if desired.
11. Garnish with sesame seeds, if desired.
